title: Only Glass GUI
description: resource pack that makes whole minecraft ui made of glass
body:
This resource pack changes GUI to look like its made of glass.  
#
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a9ef49502e22e5de32a9ab5c3ab124551b66f6de.jpeg)
**✅Done✅**
- Survival Gui
- Survival Inventory  
  
**📝Planning to Add📝**
- every ui element  
  
**⚙️Compatibility⚙️**  
- For now only tested with vanilla Minecraft 1.20.-1.21 versions
